        f_none:["{n2} просто стоит, а {n1} машет руками так глупо, что даже не обманывает, а вызывает жалость.", "Трюк {n1} настолько плох, что даже не сопротивляющийся {n2} не ведется."],

function getDegreeKey(deg) {
    if (deg == null) return 'def';
    if (deg === 4) return 'cs';
    if (deg === 3) return 's';
    if (deg === 2) return 'f';
    return 'cf';
}

const TYPE_ORDER =['atk', 'ath', 'acr', 'int', 'dec', 'def', 'none'];
const DEG_WEIGHT = { cs: 4, s: 3, f: 2, cf: 1, def: 0, none: -1 };

function getClashFlavor(typeA, subA, typeB, subB, degA, degB, nameA, nameB) {
    let t1 = typeA === 'maneuver' ? subA : (typeA === 'none' ? 'none' : (typeA === 'defense' ? 'def' : 'atk'));
    let t2 = typeB === 'maneuver' ? subB : (typeB === 'none' ? 'none' : (typeB === 'defense' ? 'def' : 'atk'));

    let n1 = `<b style="color:#d3d3d3">${nameA}</b>`;
    let n2 = `<b style="color:#d3d3d3">${nameB}</b>`;

    let d1 = t1 === 'none' ? 'none' : getDegreeKey(degA);
    let d2 = t2 === 'none' ? 'none' : getDegreeKey(degB);

    let idx1 = TYPE_ORDER.indexOf(t1);
    let idx2 = TYPE_ORDER.indexOf(t2);

    let key, firstD, secondD, firstN, secondN;

    if (idx1 < idx2) {
        key = `${t1}_vs_${t2}`;
        firstD = d1; secondD = d2; firstN = n1; secondN = n2;
    } else if (idx1 > idx2) {
        key = `${t2}_vs_${t1}`;
        firstD = d2; secondD = d1; firstN = n2; secondN = n1;
    } else {
        key = `${t1}_vs_${t2}`;
        if (DEG_WEIGHT[d1] >= DEG_WEIGHT[d2]) {
            firstD = d1; secondD = d2; firstN = n1; secondN = n2;
        } else {
            firstD = d2; secondD = d1; firstN = n2; secondN = n1;
        }
    }

    let subKey = `${firstD}_${secondD}`;
    
    let list = FLAVOR_CLASH[key]?.[subKey];
    if (!list) return `${firstN} совершает действие, а ${secondN} отвечает.`;
    
    let text = list[Math.floor(Math.random() * list.length)];
    return text.replace(/\{n1\}/g, firstN).replace(/\{n2\}/g, secondN);
}

// === 2. ВСПОМОГАТЕЛЬНЫЕ ФУНКЦИИ ===
function getActorDuelStats(actor, selectedStrikeId) {
    if (!actor) return null;
    const sys = actor.system;
    let strikes =[];
    
    if (actor.type === 'npc') {
        let meleeItems = actor.items.filter(i => i.type === 'melee');
        for (let i of meleeItems) strikes.push({ id: i.id, name: i.name, atk: i.system.bonus?.value || 0 });
    } else {
        let actions = sys.actions?.filter(a => a.type === 'strike') ||[];
        for (let [idx, a] of actions.entries()) strikes.push({ id: a.slug || a.item?.id || `strike-${idx}`, name: a.label || "Удар", atk: a.totalModifier || 0 });
    }
    
    if (strikes.length === 0) strikes.push({ id: "default", name: "Безоружная", atk: sys.abilities?.str?.mod || 0 });
    let selStrike = strikes.find(s => s.id === selectedStrikeId) || strikes[0];

    let maxDying = sys.attributes?.dying?.max || 4; 
    let doomed = actor.items.find(i => i.type === 'condition' && i.slug === 'doomed')?.system?.value?.value || 0;
    let maxWounds = maxDying - doomed;
    if (maxWounds < 1) maxWounds = 1;

    const getMod = (slug) => actor.skills?.[slug]?.mod || sys.skills?.[slug]?.mod || sys.skills?.[slug]?.base || 0;
    const getDC = (slug) => {
        if (slug === 'ac') return sys.attributes?.ac?.value || 10;
        if (slug === 'per') return actor.perception?.dc || (sys.perception?.mod + 10) || 10;
        return sys.saves?.[slug]?.dc || (sys.saves?.[slug]?.value + 10) || 10;
    };

    return {
        maxWounds: maxWounds, atk: selStrike.atk, strikeName: selStrike.name, availableStrikes: strikes,
        ath: getMod('athletics'), acr: getMod('acrobatics'), int: getMod('intimidation'), dec: getMod('deception'),
        dc_ac: getDC('ac'), dc_fort: getDC('fortitude'), dc_ref: getDC('reflex'), dc_will: getDC('will'), dc_per: getDC('per')
    };
}

// === 3. ЯДРО ОБРАБОТКИ (GM) ===
window.duelProcessAction = async function(actionData) {
    if (!game.user.isGM) return;
    let state = foundry.utils.deepClone(canvas.scene.getFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY) || { players: {}, phase: 'join', round: 1, log:[], debugMode: false });
    let changed = false;

    if (actionData.action === "toggleJoin") {
        if (state.players[actionData.actorId]) { state.players[actionData.actorId].isParticipating = actionData.isParticipating; changed = true; }
    } 
    else if (actionData.action === "selectStrike") {
        if (state.players[actionData.actorId]) { state.players[actionData.actorId].selectedStrikeId = actionData.strikeId; changed = true; }
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "planAction") {
        let p = state.players[actionData.actorId];
        if (p) { p.planned[actionData.slot] = { type: actionData.type, sub: actionData.sub }; changed = true; }
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "toggleReady") {
        if (state.players[actionData.actorId]) { state.players[actionData.actorId].isReady = actionData.isReady; changed = true; }
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "resolveRound") {
        await resolveRound(state); changed = true;
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "clear") {
        state.phase = 'join'; state.round = 1;
        state.log =["<div style='text-align:center; color:#2ecc71; background:rgba(46, 204, 113, 0.1); border:1px solid #2ecc71; padding:5px; border-radius:3px; font-weight:bold;'>--- Дуэль очищена, раны исцелены ---</div>"];
        for (let id in state.players) {
            let p = state.players[id];
            p.planned =[]; p.isReady = false; p.acPenalty = 0; p.lostActions = 0; p.wounds = 0;
        }
        changed = true;
    }
    else if (actionData.action === "reset") {
        await canvas.scene.unsetFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY);
        let app = Object.values(ui.windows).find(w => w.id === "duel-combat-window");
        if (app) app.render(false);
        return; 
    }

    if (changed) { state.lastUpdate = Date.now(); await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, state); }
};

async function resolveRound(state) {
    let activeIds = Object.keys(state.players).filter(id => state.players[id].isParticipating);
    if (activeIds.length !== 2) { ui.notifications.warn("Для раунда нужно ровно 2 активных дуэлянта!"); return; }
    
    let p1Id = activeIds[0]; let p2Id = activeIds[1];
    let p1 = state.players[p1Id]; let p2 = state.players[p2Id];

    state.log.unshift(`<div style="text-align:center; background:linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #800020, transparent); color:#A8A9AD; font-weight:bold; padding:4px; margin:10px 0; border-top:1px solid #A8A9AD; border-bottom:1px solid #A8A9AD; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:2px;">⚔️ РАУНД ${state.round} ⚔️</div>`);

    let p1NextLost = 0; let p2NextLost = 0; let p1NextAcPen = 0; let p2NextAcPen = 0;
    
    let mapP1 = { attack: 0, ath: 0, acr: 0, int: 0, dec: 0 };
    let mapP2 = { attack: 0, ath: 0, acr: 0, int: 0, dec: 0 };

    for (let slot = 0; slot < 3; slot++) {
        let act1 = p1.planned[slot] || { type: 'none' }; let act2 = p2.planned[slot] || { type: 'none' };

        if (slot >= 3 - p1.lostActions) act1 = { type: 'none' };
        if (slot >= 3 - p2.lostActions) act2 = { type: 'none' };

        if (act1.type === 'none' && act2.type === 'none') {
            let logEntry = `<div style="border-left: 3px solid #71797E; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); padding: 5px; margin-bottom: 5px; border-radius:3px;">
                <div style="text-align:center; font-size:11px; color:#A8A9AD; margin-bottom:6px; letter-spacing:2px; font-family:'Modesto Condensed', serif;">-- ДЕЙСТВИЕ ${slot+1} --</div>
                <div style="text-align:center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); padding: 6px; margin-bottom: 6px; border-radius:3px; border-left: 3px solid #800020; font-size: 11.5px; font-style: italic; color:#d3d3d3;">
                    📜 ${getClashFlavor('none', null, 'none', null, null, null, p1.name, p2.name)}
                </div>
            </div>`;
            state.log.unshift(logEntry);
            continue;
        }

        let logEntry = `<div style="border-left: 3px solid #71797E; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); padding: 5px; margin-bottom: 5px; border-radius:3px;">`;
        logEntry += `<div style="text-align:center; font-size:11px; color:#A8A9AD; margin-bottom:6px; letter-spacing:2px; font-family:'Modesto Condensed', serif;">-- ДЕЙСТВИЕ ${slot+1} --</div>`;

        let evalAct = async (attacker, defender, actA, actD, mapObj) => {
            if (actA.type === 'none' || actA.type === 'defense') return { html: "", deg: null };
            
            let statsA = getActorDuelStats(game.actors.get(attacker.id), attacker.selectedStrikeId);
            let statsD = getActorDuelStats(game.actors.get(defender.id), defender.selectedStrikeId);
            
            let actTypeForMap = actA.type === 'maneuver' ? actA.sub : actA.type;
            let mapCount = mapObj[actTypeForMap] || 0;
            let mapPen = mapCount === 0 ? 0 : (mapCount === 1 ? -4 : -8);
            
            let baseMod = actA.type === 'attack' ? statsA.atk : statsA[actA.sub];
            let rollMod = mapPen; 
            let dcPen = defender.acPenalty; 
            let rpsTxtDetail = "";
            let rollFormula = "1d20 + @m";

            if (actD.type === 'defense') {
                rollFormula = "2d20kl + @m"; 
                rpsTxtDetail += " | Взаимодействие: <span style='color:#ffaa00'>По Обороне (Неудача 2d20kl)</span>";
            }
            if (actA.type === 'maneuver' && actD.type === 'attack') {
                rollMod -= 2;
                rpsTxtDetail += " | Взаимодействие: <span style='color:#ffaa00'>-2 (vs Атака)</span>";
            }
            if (actA.type === 'maneuver' && actD.type === 'defense') {
                dcPen += 2;
                rpsTxtDetail += " | Взаимодействие: <span style='color:#2ecc71'>Преимущество (КС цели -2)</span>";
            }

            let totalMod = baseMod + rollMod;
            let dcType = actA.type === 'attack' ? 'dc_ac' : (actA.sub === 'ath' ? 'dc_fort' : actA.sub === 'acr' ? 'dc_ref' : actA.sub === 'int' ? 'dc_will' : 'dc_per');
            let dc = statsD[dcType] - dcPen;
            
            let roll = await new Roll(rollFormula, {m: totalMod}).evaluate({async:true});
            let total = roll.total; 
            let d20 = roll.dice[0].total;
            let diceResults = roll.dice[0].results.map(r => r.result);
            
            let diceStr = `🎲 ${d20}`;
            if (diceResults.length > 1) {
                diceStr = `🎲[${diceResults.join(', ')}] ➔ Наименьшее: <b>${d20}</b>`;
            }
            
            let deg = (total >= dc + 10) ? 4 : (total >= dc ? 3 : (total <= dc - 10 ? 1 : 2));
            if (d20 === 20) deg = Math.min(deg + 1, 4); if (d20 === 1) deg = Math.max(deg - 1, 1);
            deg = Math.min(Math.max(deg, 1), 4);

            let resultHtml = "";
            let effTxt = "";
            
            if (actA.type === 'attack') {
                let woundsDelt = 0; 
                if (deg === 4) woundsDelt = 2; else if (deg === 3) woundsDelt = 1;
                
                if (woundsDelt > 0) {
                    defender.wounds = (defender.wounds || 0) + woundsDelt;
                    let word = woundsDelt === 1 ? 'рану' : 'раны';
                    effTxt = `<b>Эффект:</b> Цель получает <b style="color:#ff4444">+${woundsDelt} ${word}</b>.<br>`;
                }
                if (deg === 1) {
                    if(attacker.id === p1Id) p1NextLost++; else p2NextLost++;
                    effTxt = `<b>Эффект:</b> <b style="color:#ffaa00">Вы теряете 1 действие.</b><br>`;
                }
            } 
            else if (actA.type === 'maneuver') {
                if (deg === 4) {
                    if(defender.id === p1Id) { p1NextAcPen += 2; p1NextLost++; } else { p2NextAcPen += 2; p2NextLost++; }
                    effTxt = `<b>Эффект:</b> <b style="color:#2ecc71">Цель теряет 2 КБ и 1 действие.</b><br>`;
                } else if (deg === 3) {
                    if(defender.id === p1Id) p1NextAcPen += 2; else p2NextAcPen += 2;
                    effTxt = `<b>Эффект:</b> <b style="color:#2ecc71">Цель теряет 2 КБ.</b><br>`;
                } else if (deg === 1) {
                    if(attacker.id === p1Id) p1NextLost++; else p2NextLost++;
                    effTxt = `<b>Эффект:</b> <b style="color:#ffaa00">Вы теряете 1 действие.</b><br>`;
                }
            }

            let actTypeName = "";
            if (actA.type === 'attack') actTypeName = "⚔️ АТАКА";
            else if (actA.sub === 'ath') actTypeName = "🤹 МАНЕВР (Атлетика)";
            else if (actA.sub === 'acr') actTypeName = "🤹 МАНЕВР (Акробатика)";
            else if (actA.sub === 'int') actTypeName = "🤹 МАНЕВР (Запугивание)";
            else if (actA.sub === 'dec') actTypeName = "🤹 МАНЕВР (Обман)";

            let badge = deg===4?"КРИТ":deg===3?"УСПЕХ":deg===2?"ПРОМАХ":"КРИТ ПРОМАХ";
            let col = deg===4?"#800020":deg===3?"#4a0404":deg===2?"#555":"#880000";
            
            resultHtml += `<div style="margin-top:4px;"><span style="background:${col}; color:#d3d3d3; padding:1px 4px; border-radius:2px; font-size:9px;">${actTypeName}: ${badge}</span>`;
            resultHtml += `<div style="font-size:10px; color:#aaa; margin-top:4px; padding:4px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border-left:2px solid #555;">
              <b>Модификатор:</b> База (${baseMod>=0?'+':''}${baseMod}) | ШМА (${mapPen})${rpsTxtDetail} = <b>${totalMod>=0?'+':''}${totalMod}</b><br>
              <b>Бросок:</b> ${diceStr} + ${totalMod} = <b>${total}</b> против КС <b>${dc}</b><br>
              ${effTxt}
            </div></div>`;
            
            mapObj[actTypeForMap]++; 
            return { html: resultHtml, deg: deg };
        };

        let wrapBlock = (html, title) => {
            if (!html) return "";
            return `<div style="border: 1px solid #4a0404; background: rgba(10,10,10,0.8); padding: 5px; margin-bottom: 5px; border-radius: 4px;">
                        <div style="font-weight:bold; font-size:11px; color:#ffaa00; border-bottom:1px dashed #4a0404; margin-bottom:4px; padding-bottom:2px;">Ход: ${title}</div>
                        ${html}
                    </div>`;
        };

        let p1Log = ""; let p2Log = "";
        
        let res1 = await evalAct(p1, p2, act1, act2, mapP1);
        let res2 = await evalAct(p2, p1, act2, act1, mapP2);

        let narrativeText = getClashFlavor(act1.type, act1.sub, act2.type, act2.sub, res1.deg, res2.deg, p1.name, p2.name);
        let narrativeBlock = `<div style="text-align:center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.6); padding: 6px; margin-bottom: 6px; border-radius:3px; border-left: 3px solid #800020; font-size: 11.5px; font-style: italic; color:#d3d3d3;">
            📜 ${narrativeText}
        </div>`;
        logEntry += narrativeBlock;

        if (act1.type === 'defense') p1Log += `<div style="font-size:11px; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:bold; color:#A8A9AD;">🛡️ Уходит в глухую оборону.</div>`;
        if (act1.type === 'none') p1Log += `<div style="font-size:11px; margin-bottom:4px; font-style:italic; color:#888;">⏳ Потеря или пропуск действия...</div>`;
        if (res1.html) p1Log += res1.html;

        if (act2.type === 'defense') p2Log += `<div style="font-size:11px; margin-bottom:4px; font-weight:bold; color:#A8A9AD;">🛡️ Уходит в глухую оборону.</div>`;
        if (act2.type === 'none') p2Log += `<div style="font-size:11px; margin-bottom:4px; font-style:italic; color:#888;">⏳ Потеря или пропуск действия...</div>`;
        if (res2.html) p2Log += res2.html;

        if (p1Log) logEntry += wrapBlock(p1Log, p1.name);
        if (p2Log) logEntry += wrapBlock(p2Log, p2.name);

        logEntry += `</div>`;
        state.log.unshift(logEntry);
    }

    p1.acPenalty = p1NextAcPen; p1.lostActions = Math.min(3, p1NextLost);
    p2.acPenalty = p2NextAcPen; p2.lostActions = Math.min(3, p2NextLost);

    p1.isReady = false; p2.isReady = false;
    p1.planned =[]; p2.planned =[];
    state.round++;

    let stats1New = getActorDuelStats(game.actors.get(p1.id));
    let stats2New = getActorDuelStats(game.actors.get(p2.id));
    let checkWin = (p, maxW) => (p.wounds || 0) >= maxW; 
    let p1Dead = checkWin(p1, stats1New.maxWounds); 
    let p2Dead = checkWin(p2, stats2New.maxWounds);

    if (p1Dead || p2Dead) {
        state.phase = 'end';
        let endTxt = "";
        if (p1Dead && p2Dead) endTxt = "НИЧЬЯ! Оба дуэлянта падают, истекая кровью.";
        else if (p1Dead) endTxt = `🏆 ПОБЕДА: ${p2.name}! Противник сломлен.`;
        else endTxt = `🏆 ПОБЕДА: ${p1.name}! Противник сломлен.`;
        
        state.log.unshift(`<div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg, #4a0404, #800020, #4a0404); border:2px solid #A8A9AD; padding:10px; border-radius:5px; color:#d3d3d3; text-align:center; font-weight:bold; font-size:13px; text-shadow:1px 1px 2px black;">${endTxt}</div>`);
    }
}

  .dl-header-thematic h2 { margin: 0; color: #d3d3d3; text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px black; letter-spacing: 3px; font-size: 18px; border: none; font-family: 'Modesto Condensed', serif; }
  
  .dl-player-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #222, #111); margin-bottom: 15px; padding: 12px; border: 2px solid #4a0404; border-radius: 4px; position: relative; box-shadow: inset 0 0 10px black; }
  .dl-player-card.is-ready { border-color: #28a745; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(40,167,69,0.3); }
  
  .dl-wound-bar-bg { background: #111; height: 12px; width: 100%; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 5px; border: 1px solid #4a0404; position: relative;}
  .dl-wound-bar-fill { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #800020, #ff0000); height: 100%; transition: 0.5s; }
  
  .dl-action-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); padding: 5px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #333; }
  .dl-action-row.disabled { opacity: 0.3; pointer-events: none; }
  
  .dl-act-btn { background: #2c2c2c; color: #A8A9AD; border: 1px solid #555; padding: 4px 4px; font-size: 9.5px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 3px; font-weight: bold; flex: 0.8; text-align: center; white-space: nowrap;}
  .dl-act-btn.active { background: #800020; color: white; border-color: #ff4444; box-shadow: 0 0 5px red; }
  .dl-act-btn:hover:not(.active) { background: #4a0404; color: white; }
  
  .dl-select { background: #800020; color: #d3d3d3; border: 1px solid #ff4444; padding: 3px; font-size: 10px; border-radius: 3px; outline: none; flex: 1.6;}
  .dl-select option, .dl-weapon-select option { background: #2a0808; color: #d3d3d3; }
  
  .dl-weapon-select { background: #222; color: #ccc; border: 1px solid #555; font-size: 11px; padding: 3px; width: 100%; border-radius: 3px; outline: none; cursor:pointer;}
  
  .dl-col-log { flex: 1.9; background: #050505; padding: 15px; padding-bottom: 50px; font-size: 11.5px; overflow-y: auto; color: #A8A9AD; }
  
  .dl-footer { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 42px; background: #0a0a0a; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 0 20px; border-top: 2px solid #A8A9AD; z-index: 100;}
  .dl-btn-main { background: #4a0404; color: #d3d3d3; border: 1px solid #A8A9AD; cursor: pointer; padding: 0 14px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 11px; border-radius: 3px; height: 28px; line-height: 26px; }
  .dl-btn-main:hover { background: #800020; box-shadow: 0 0 8px #ff4444; }
  
  .dl-status-badge { background: #800020; border: 1px solid #ff4444; color: white; font-size: 9px; padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 3px; display: inline-block; margin-top: 5px;}
</style>
`;

const template = `
<div id="duel-app">
  <div class="dl-col-rules">
    <div class="dl-rule-header"><span>📜 ПРАВИЛА ДУЭЛИ</span></div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:10px; line-height: 1.3;">
      <b>Цель:</b> Нанести противнику Раны, равные его порогу Смерти (базово 4). Черта <i>"Живучесть"</i> (Diehard) увеличивает порог, а состояние <i>"Обречен"</i> (Doomed) — снижает его.<br>
      <b>Действия:</b> 3 слота в раунд.<br>
      <hr style="border-color:#4a0404; margin: 8px 0;">
      <b>🗡️ Атака:</b> Выбранное оружие vs КБ.<br>
        • <i style="color:#2ecc71">Успех:</i> 1 Рана | <i style="color:#2ecc71">Крит:</i> 2 Раны<br>
      <b>🛡️ Оборона:</b> Глухая защита.<br>
      <b>🤹 Маневр:</b> Атл vs Стк, Акр vs Реф, Зап vs Воля, Обм vs Восп.<br>
        • <i style="color:#2ecc71">Успех:</i> -2 КБ цели | <i style="color:#2ecc71">Крит:</i> -2 КБ и -1 действие<br>
      <hr style="border-color:#4a0404; margin: 8px 0;">
      <b>К-Н-Б (Взаимодействие действий):</b><br>
      • <i>Атака vs Оборона:</i> Атакующий получает штраф <b>-2</b>.<br>
      • <i>Маневр vs Атака:</i> Маневрирующий получает штраф <b>-2</b>.<br>
      • <i>Маневр vs Оборона:</i> Оборона прорвана. КС Обороняющегося снижен на <b>-2</b>.<br>
      <hr style="border-color:#4a0404; margin: 8px 0;">
      <b>Оборона (Глухая защита):</b><br>
      Любые враждебные проверки по персонажу в Обороне бросаются с Неудачей: атакующий бросает <b>2d20</b> и берет <b>наименьший</b> результат.<br>
      <hr style="border-color:#4a0404; margin: 8px 0;">
      <b>ШМА (Штраф Множественной Атаки):</b><br>
      Считается <b>отдельно</b> для Атаки и каждого вида Маневра.<br>
      1-е: <b>0</b> | 2-е: <b>-4</b> | 3-е: <b>-8</b>.<br>
      Оборона не имеет штрафов.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="dl-col-main">
    <div class="dl-header-thematic"><h2>🩸 БОЕВАЯ ДУЭЛЬ 🩸</h2></div>
    {{#each players}}
      <div class="dl-player-card {{#if this.isReady}}is-ready{{/if}}">
        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;">
            <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;">
                <img src="{{this.img}}" width="40" height="40" style="border-radius:4px; border:1px solid #A8A9AD;">
                <div>
                    <div style="font-weight:bold; font-size:16px; color:#fff;">{{this.name}}</div>
                    <div style="font-size:11px; color:#ff4444; font-weight:bold;">
                        Раны: {{this.wounds}} / {{this.stats.maxWounds}}
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              {{#if ../isJoinPhase}}
                  <label style="font-size:11px; cursor:pointer; color:#A8A9AD;"><input type="checkbox" class="dl-join-cb" data-actor="{{this.id}}" {{#if this.isParticipating}}checked{{/if}}> УЧАСТНИК</label>
              {{/if}}
              {{#if (and ../isPlayingPhase this.isOwner)}}
                  <button class="dl-btn-main dl-ready-btn" data-actor="{{this.id}}" style="height:24px; line-height:22px; {{#if this.isReady}}background:#1e4d2b; border-color:#0f0;{{/if}}">{{#if this.isReady}}ГОТОВ{{else}}ПОДТВЕРДИТЬ{{/if}}</button>
              {{/if}}
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div style="margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:4px;">
            {{#if (and this.isOwner (not this.isReady))}}
                <select class="dl-weapon-select" data-actor="{{this.id}}">
                    {{#each this.stats.availableStrikes}}
                        <option value="{{this.id}}" {{#if (eq ../selectedStrikeId this.id)}}selected{{/if}}>⚔️ {{this.name}} (+{{this.atk}})</option>
                    {{/each}}
                </select>
            {{else}}
                <div style="font-size:11px; color:#ffaa00; text-align:center; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); padding:3px; border-radius:3px; border:1px solid #4a0404;">
                    <b>Оружие:</b> {{this.stats.strikeName}} (+{{this.stats.atk}})
                </div>
            {{/if}}
        </div>

        {{#if this.showStats}}
            <div style="font-size:11px; color:#ccc; margin-bottom:5px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.3); padding:3px; border-radius:3px; text-align:center; border: 1px dashed #555;">
                <b>КБ:</b> {{this.stats.dc_ac}} | <b>СТК:</b> {{this.stats.dc_fort}} | <b>РЕФ:</b> {{this.stats.dc_ref}} | <b>ВОЛ:</b> {{this.stats.dc_will}} | <b>ВОСП:</b> {{this.stats.dc_per}}
            </div>
        {{else}}
            <div style="font-size:11px; color:#555; margin-bottom:5px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.1); padding:3px; border-radius:3px; text-align:center; border: 1px dashed #222;">
                <i>Защитные характеристики скрыты</i>
            </div>
        {{/if}}
        
        <div class="dl-wound-bar-bg"><div class="dl-wound-bar-fill" style="width:{{this.woundPct}}%;"></div></div>
        
        {{#if (or this.acPenalty this.lostActions)}}
            <div style="display:flex; gap:5px;">
                {{#if this.acPenalty}}<div class="dl-status-badge">Накоплен штраф КБ: -{{this.acPenalty}}</div>{{/if}}
                {{#if this.lostActions}}<div class="dl-status-badge">Потеряно действий: {{this.lostActions}}</div>{{/if}}
            </div>
        {{/if}}

        {{#if ../isPlayingPhase}}
            {{#if this.isOwner}}
                {{#each this.actionSlots}}
                    <div class="dl-action-row {{#if this.isDisabled}}disabled{{/if}}">
                        <span style="font-size:12px; font-weight:bold; color:#A8A9AD; width:20px;">{{this.num}}</span>
                        <div class="dl-act-btn {{#if (eq this.planned.type 'attack')}}active{{/if}}" data-actor="{{../id}}" data-slot="{{@index}}" data-type="attack">
                            ⚔️ Атака ({{#if (gte ../stats.atk 0)}}+{{/if}}{{../stats.atk}})
                        </div>
                        <div class="dl-act-btn {{#if (eq this.planned.type 'defense')}}active{{/if}}" data-actor="{{../id}}" data-slot="{{@index}}" data-type="defense">
                            🛡️ Оборона
                        </div>
                        <div class="dl-act-btn {{#if (eq this.planned.type 'maneuver')}}active{{/if}}" data-actor="{{../id}}" data-slot="{{@index}}" data-type="maneuver">
                            🤹 Маневр
                        </div>
                        <select class="dl-select dl-man-sel" data-actor="{{../id}}" data-slot="{{@index}}" {{#unless (eq this.planned.type 'maneuver')}}disabled style="opacity:0.3"{{/unless}}>
                            <option value="ath" {{#if (eq this.planned.sub 'ath')}}selected{{/if}}>Атлетика ({{#if (gte ../stats.ath 0)}}+{{/if}}{{../stats.ath}}) vs Стойкость</option>
                            <option value="acr" {{#if (eq this.planned.sub 'acr')}}selected{{/if}}>Акробатика ({{#if (gte ../stats.acr 0)}}+{{/if}}{{../stats.acr}}) vs Рефлекс</option>
                            <option value="int" {{#if (eq this.planned.sub 'int')}}selected{{/if}}>Запугив. ({{#if (gte ../stats.int 0)}}+{{/if}}{{../stats.int}}) vs Воля</option>
                            <option value="dec" {{#if (eq this.planned.sub 'dec')}}selected{{/if}}>Обман ({{#if (gte ../stats.dec 0)}}+{{/if}}{{../stats.dec}}) vs Восприятие</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                {{/each}}
            {{else}}
                <div style="margin-top:10px; text-align:center; font-style:italic; color:#888; font-size:11px;">
                    {{#if this.isReady}}Действия спланированы.{{else}}Планирует действия...{{/if}}
                </div>
            {{/if}}
        {{/if}}
      </div>
    {{/each}}
  </div>

  <div class="dl-col-log">
    <h4 style="margin:0 0 10px 0; color:#d3d3d3; border-bottom:2px solid #800020; padding-bottom:5px;">📜 ЖУРНАЛ БОЯ</h4>
    {{#each state.log}}<div style="margin-bottom:8px; border-bottom:1px solid #333; padding-bottom:4px; font-size:11px; line-height:1.2;">{{{this}}}</div>{{/each}}
  </div>

  <div class="dl-footer">
    <div>
      {{#if isGM}}
        <label style="font-size:11px; color:#888; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px;">
            <input type="checkbox" id="dl-debug" {{#if state.debugMode}}checked{{/if}}> Режим ГМ (Отладка)
        </label>
      {{/if}}
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:10px;">
      {{#if isGM}}
        {{#if (eq state.phase 'join')}}<button class="dl-btn-main" id="dl-start">НАЧАТЬ ДУЭЛЬ</button>{{/if}}
        {{#if (eq state.phase 'play')}}<button class="dl-btn-main" id="dl-resolve" style="background:#800020;">РАЗРЕШИТЬ РАУНД</button>{{/if}}
        <button class="dl-btn-main" id="dl-clear" style="background:#6a3a00;">ОЧИСТИТЬ</button>
        <button class="dl-btn-main" id="dl-reset" style="background:#333;">СБРОС</button>
      {{/if}}
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
`;

class DuelGame extends Application {
  static get defaultOptions() { return foundry.utils.mergeObject(super.defaultOptions, { id: "duel-combat-window", title: "Дуэль - Боевая", width: 1400, height: 800, resizable: true, dragDrop:[{ dropSelector: "#duel-app" }] }); }
  async _renderInner(data) {
    Handlebars.registerHelper('eq', (a, b) => a === b); Handlebars.registerHelper('and', (a, b) => a && b);
    Handlebars.registerHelper('or', (a, b) => a || b); Handlebars.registerHelper('gte', (a, b) => a >= b);
    Handlebars.registerHelper('not', (a) => !a);
    return $(style + Handlebars.compile(template)(data));
  }
  _getState() { return canvas.scene.getFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY) || { players: {}, phase: 'join', round: 1, log:[], debugMode: false }; }
  
  getData() {
    const state = this._getState(); const playersData =[];
    let activeCombatants = Object.values(state.players).filter(p => p.isParticipating);
    let isSpectator = !activeCombatants.some(p => game.actors.get(p.id)?.isOwner);

    for (let id in state.players) {
        let p = state.players[id]; let actor = game.actors.get(id);
        if (!actor) continue;
        
        let stats = getActorDuelStats(actor, p.selectedStrikeId);
        let wounds = p.wounds || 0;
        let woundPct = Math.min(100, (wounds / stats.maxWounds) * 100);
        let isOwner = actor.isOwner && (!game.user.isGM || actor.type === 'npc' || state.debugMode);
        let showStats = game.user.isGM || isOwner || (isSpectator && actor.type === 'character');
        
        let actionSlots =[];
        let availableSlots = 3 - (p.lostActions || 0);
        for(let i=0; i<3; i++) {
            actionSlots.push({ num: i+1, isDisabled: i >= availableSlots, planned: p.planned?.[i] || {type:'none'} });
        }
        
        playersData.push({ ...p, id, isOwner, showStats, wounds, woundPct, stats, actionSlots });
    }
    return { state, players: playersData, isGM: game.user.isGM, isJoinPhase: state.phase === 'join', isPlayingPhase: state.phase === 'play' };
  }

  activateListeners(html) {
    super.activateListeners(html);
    html.find('.dl-join-cb').change(ev => this._sendAction({ action: "toggleJoin", actorId: ev.currentTarget.dataset.actor, isParticipating: ev.currentTarget.checked }));
    html.find('.dl-weapon-select').change(ev => this._sendAction({ action: "selectStrike", actorId: $(ev.currentTarget).data("actor"), strikeId: $(ev.currentTarget).val() }));

    html.find('.dl-act-btn').click(ev => {
        let btn = $(ev.currentTarget);
        if (btn.parent().hasClass('disabled')) return;
        let actorId = btn.data("actor"); let slot = btn.data("slot"); let type = btn.data("type");
        let sub = html.find(`.dl-man-sel[data-actor="${actorId}"][data-slot="${slot}"]`).val() || 'ath';
        this._sendAction({ action: "planAction", actorId, slot, type, sub });
    });
    
    html.find('.dl-man-sel').change(ev => {
        let sel = $(ev.currentTarget);
        this._sendAction({ action: "planAction", actorId: sel.data("actor"), slot: sel.data("slot"), type: 'maneuver', sub: sel.val() });
    });

    html.find('.dl-ready-btn').click(ev => {
        let actorId = $(ev.currentTarget).data("actor");
        this._sendAction({ action: "toggleReady", actorId, isReady: !this._getState().players[actorId].isReady });
    });

    if (game.user.isGM) {
        html.find('#dl-debug').change(async (ev) => { 
            let s = this._getState(); s.debugMode = ev.currentTarget.checked; 
            await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, s); 
        });
        html.find('#dl-start').click(async () => {
            let s = this._getState(); s.phase = 'play'; s.round = 1;
            for (let id in s.players) { s.players[id].planned =[]; s.players[id].isReady = false; s.players[id].acPenalty = 0; s.players[id].lostActions = 0; }
            s.log.unshift(`<div style="text-align:center; color:#ff4444; border:2px solid #800020; background:rgba(128,0,32,0.2); padding:5px; margin-bottom:10px; font-weight:bold;">ДУЭЛЬ НАЧАЛАСЬ!</div>`);
            await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, s);
        });
        html.find('#dl-resolve').click(() => this._sendAction({ action: "resolveRound" }));
        html.find('#dl-clear').click(() => this._sendAction({ action: "clear" }));
        html.find('#dl-reset').click(() => this._sendAction({ action: "reset" }));
    }
  }

  async _onDrop(event) {
    if (!game.user.isGM) return;
    const data = JSON.parse(event.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain')); if (data.type !== "Actor") return;
    let actor = await fromUuid(data.uuid); if (!actor) return;
    let state = this._getState();
    if (!state.players[actor.id]) state.players[actor.id] = { id: actor.id, name: actor.name, img: actor.img, isParticipating: true, planned:[], isReady: false, acPenalty: 0, lostActions: 0, wounds: 0, selectedStrikeId: null };
    await canvas.scene.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_KEY, state);
  }

  async _sendAction(data) {
    if (game.user.isGM) await window.duelProcessAction(data);
    else await game.user.setFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_ACTION, { ...data, ts: Date.now() });
  }
}

if (!window.duelCombatHookV19) {
    Hooks.on("updateUser", async (user, changes) => {
        if (!game.user.isGM) return;
        const f = changes.flags?.[FLAG_SCOPE]?.[FLAG_ACTION];
        if (f) { await window.duelProcessAction(f); await user.unsetFlag(FLAG_SCOPE, FLAG_ACTION); }
    });
    Hooks.on("updateScene", (scene, data) => {
        if (hasProperty(data, `flags.${FLAG_SCOPE}.${FLAG_KEY}`)) {
            let app = Object.values(ui.windows).find(w => w.id === "duel-combat-window");
            if (app) app.render(false);
        }
    });
    window.duelCombatHookV19 = true;
}
new DuelGame().render(true);
})();
